'''Shelova Week''' was a [[holiday]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was a traditional [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] holiday that celebrated commerce and family (which were interrelated in the Herglic race). Shelova Week was a time to exchange gifts, make new business alliances, discuss trade arrangements, and spend time with family members. As the [[Human/Legends|Human]] population of the sector began interacting with the Herglics, they too began celebrating the holiday, although many Humans simply took the vacation instead of also developing business partnerships. On the [[Tapani calendar|Tapani local calendar]], Shelova Week fell between the months of [[Helona]] and [[Melona]].<ref name="LE" />
